query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chatHistory (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  agent VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chatHistory (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  agent VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
